## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Okta's AI-powered SDR workflow and explore potential improvements with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nick is excited about the SDR manager gem's potential to streamline account research and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Current pain points include account prioritization and efficient signal identification among numerous accounts](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Future improvements could include web search capabilities, automated signal updates, and scalability across industries](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

## Topics

### Current SDR Workflow and Challenges

  - [Nick manages \~750-800 relevant accounts out of 1,500 in Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Prioritizes accounts based on industry (e.g., retail, finance), financial health, and potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Time-consuming to manually research and identify signals for numerous accounts](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Uses tools like Sales Navigator and SimilarWeb for initial research](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### AI-Powered SDR Manager Benefits

  - [Excited about the gem's ability to provide account breakdowns and leverage points](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Appreciates the "manager" approach, forcing critical thinking beyond just using provided research](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Potential to significantly speed up custom messaging at scale](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

### Desired Improvements and Questions

  - [Web search capabilities to find recent, relevant information (e.g., new loyalty program announcements)](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Automated signal updates to keep information current without manual intervention](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Scalability to apply the workflow beyond retail accounts](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Concerns about the time required for SDRs to compile account lists for the system](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Account Research Process Demo

  - [Demonstrated research process using Cole Haan as an example](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Checks Salesforce for customer type and past interactions](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Uses Sales Navigator to identify company priorities](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Examines login process for potential improvement areas](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Utilizes SimilarWeb for traffic data and user engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Collaboration with AEs

  - [Varies based on individual AE's experience and motivation](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Some AEs actively participate in outreach, while others are less aggressive with new business](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to access and test the SDR manager gem with his own accounts before presenting to the team](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Kyle to explore more programmatic ways to input account lists and generate briefs](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to gather more feedback and insights from Nick](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Continue refining the workflow to make it more repeatable and scalable across different industries](https://fathom.video/share/WxUKkM_CXo8N98tm4oWxvMkGKENFDgxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
